text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism that updates every 5 seconds, prioritizing critical and recent changes. This ensures the agent focuses on retaining information most relevant to its current task, avoiding the pitfalls of static importance scoring and minimizing the overhead of frequent source updates.
reason: This directly addresses the 'Why' in the previous sections: preventing the agent from losing critical information due to outdated or irrelevant data. The 5-second update cycle provides a balance between responsiveness and efficiency, crucial for the observed gains in computational cost and memory usage.
